title: tenn well 5mm Thick Jute Twine String, 30m Natural Jute Garden Rope for Gardening, Cat Scratcher, Gift Wrapping and Crafts Decoration (Brown)
features: THICK TWINE - Durable 5mm in diameter, the twisted jute garden string is thick and strong, and able to grip the items more tightly comparing with traditional twine
NATURAL JUTE - Made up with jute, this jute twine is safe to use and won't hurt the environment
SIZE - With the diameter 0.2 inch / 5mm and 100 Feet / 30m for the length, the jute twine can be used in various occasions
MULTI-PURPOSE - This natural jute rope is also great for DIY cat scratcher post, wrapping around the legs of furniture, wall hangings and other craft decorative projects
EASY TO USE - Packed on a coil, the garden twine will not intertwined with each other and can be cut any length as you need
description: Product Description This natural jute rope is twisted by 4 strands, perfect for crafting, gardening, packing, bundling and macrame projects DIY PLANT HANGERS Suitable for making macrame plant hangers or making wall hanging shelves BOTTLE DECORATION Great for decorating wine bottles, mason jars, larger vases, flower pots to give it a rustic look REFURBISH CAT SCRATCH POST Perfect for cat scratching post, wrapping pipes or furniture legs and other crafting projects HOME DECORATIVE ROPE This jute rope is also a good choice as a decorative rope for home and garden PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Natural Jute Length: Approx. 100 feet (30 meters) Thickness: Approx.3/16 inch (5mm) Color: Brown REMINDER NOTES: 1, To avoid being unraveled, please kindly tape the end of twine or make a knot after cutting it; 2, All natural jute has a weird smell, but it will be distributed in the air
